title: Kakeibo - Budget Tracker
description: Discover the Art of Mindful Budgeting with KakeiboTransform your relationship with money using the traditional Japanese Kakeibo method. This elegant app brings centuries-old wisdom to modern financial management, helping you build better money habits through mindful tracking and reflection.

title: MakeFoodOf - Cook What You Got
description: Turn your kitchen ingredients into amazing home-cooked meals! MakeFoodOf helps you discover what to cook based on what you already have at home.

description: Simple water tracking that works. Custom daily goals, smart notifications, and streak celebrations keep you hydrated. Upgrade for full customization.

description: Never miss a sale again. Log discounts, uncover store patterns, and let your diary tell you the perfect moment to buy. Smart shopping starts here.

title: FlashLearn IT

title: FlashLearn JP

title: FlashLearn CN

title: Pasu - Pet Passport
description: Keep every pet's health at your fingertips. Track vaccines, vet visits, weight & medical history. Get reminders before shots are due and export a PDF for your vet.
